verdict: Accurately timed to the 110 BPM tempo, but severely held back by extremely lazy, repetitive circular patterns during the chorus.

issues.problem: Incredibly lazy and repetitive 4-note circular loop (D-U-L-R) repeated nearly 7 times consecutively, which feels highly mechanical and creates uncomfortable double-steps on pad.
Continues the lazy chorus design by simply reversing the circular pattern to D-U-R-L and repeating it, ignoring the expressive vocal melody.
